message.content:
You are fixing ESLint warnings for RECO-799 in this NestJS repo. 

TASK: Fix 2 ESLint warnings in `src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts`:
- Line 212: `custom-rules/require-object-params` — function must use single object destructuring parameter
- Line 282: `custom-rules/require-object-params` — function must use single object destructuring parameter

STEPS:
1. Create branch from main: `git checkout main && git checkout -b RECO-799-fix-eslint-style-copurchase-model`
2. Read the file around lines 212 and 282 to see function signatures and their call sites
3. Convert positional params to named object params: `fn(a: string, b: number)` → `fn({ a, b }: { a: string; b: number })`
4. Update ALL call sites of each function
5. Run `npx eslint src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts` to verify 0 warnings
6. Run `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty` to verify types pass
7. Commit: `git add . && git commit --no-verify -m "RECO-799: fix ESLint warnings in style-copurchase.model.ts\n\nConvert positional params to named object params.\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"`
8. Push: `git push --no-verify -u origin RECO-799-fix-eslint-style-copurchase-model`
9. Create PR: `gh pr create --title "RECO-799: Fix ESLint warnings in style-copurchase.model.ts" --body "## Summary\n- Convert positional params to named object params (require-object-params)\n\n## Test plan\n- [x] ESLint passes\n- [x] TypeScript passes\n- [ ] CI passes\n\n🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)"`

IMPORTANT: Use `--no-verify` for both commit and push. The hooks run full test suite which times out.
IMPORTANT: When updating call sites, search ENTIRE codebase with grep for the function name.
IMPORTANT: NO COMMENTS in code per project rules.

content.text: The linter keeps reverting my changes in the model file. It seems like there's a formatter running on save. Let me re-read both files, make all edits, then immediately commit with `--no-verify`.
Everything is back to the original state. Let me use `sed` via bash to make all changes at once and immediately commit, avoiding the linter interference.

input.command:
\
MODEL_FILE="src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts" && \
SERVICE_FILE="src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts" && \
COMMAND_FILE="src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts" && \
\
# Fix model: bulkInsert signature
sed -i '' 's/	async bulkInsert(/	async bulkInsert({/' "$MODEL_FILE" && \
sed -i '' 's/		pairs: {$/		pairs,/' "$MODEL_FILE" && \
sed -i '' '/^	async bulkInsert({$/,/): Promise<void> {/{
  s/^		pairs,$/		pairs,\
	}: {\
		pairs: {/
}' "$MODEL_FILE" && \
echo "Model bulkInsert partial done" && \
\
# Fix model: formatValidationErrors signature  
sed -i '' 's/private formatValidationErrors(errors: ValidationError\[\]): string {/private formatValidationErrors({ errors }: { errors: ValidationError[] }): string {/' "$MODEL_FILE" && \
echo "Model formatValidationErrors done" && \
\
# Fix model: formatValidationErrors call sites
sed -i '' 's/this\.formatValidationErrors(errors)/this.formatValidationErrors({ errors })/g' "$MODEL_FILE" && \
echo "Model call sites done"
input.description: Apply model file changes via sed

content.text:
Done. Here is the summary:

**Branch**: `RECO-799-fix-eslint-style-copurchase-model`
**PR**: https://github.com/customink/recommendations-service/pull/546

**Changes made across 3 files:**

1. `/src/modules/db/style-copurchases/models/style-copurchase.model.ts`
   - `bulkInsert(pairs: ...)` converted to `bulkInsert({ pairs }: { pairs: ... })`
   - `formatValidationErrors(errors: ...)` converted to `formatValidationErrors({ errors }: { errors: ... })`
   - Updated 2 call sites of `formatValidationErrors` within the same file

2. `/src/modules/db/style-copurchases/style-copurchases.service.ts`
   - Updated `bulkInsert` signature and its `paramFormatter` to use named params
   - Updated the call to `this.styleCopurchaseModel.bulkInsert({ pairs })`

3. `/src/modules/cli/commands/populate-style-copurchases.command.ts`
   - Updated call: `bulkInsert(mapped)` to `bulkInsert({ pairs: mapped })`

**Verification**: ESLint passes with 0 warnings on the model file; no new TypeScript errors introduced.
